review_criteria: Verify that the 'documentation/' directory hierarchy was correctly created (HUMAN_GUIDES, AI_GUIDES, SAMPLES).
Verify that 'README.md' was modified to act strictly as a minimalist directory navigator.
Verify that NO existing files in 'docs/' or 'protocol/' were deleted, moved, or renamed.
Verify that NO MCP server files, runtime environments, or bootstrap scripts were created or modified.
Verify that artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
